title: CHANGES İN THE ACTİVİTY DYNAMİCS OF NADPH SYNTHESİS İN CHİCKPEA SEEDLİNGS  UNDER SALT STRESS CONDİTİONS
author: Asadova, Basti Qoshun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Cytoplasmic forms of the enzyme Q6PDH, which is the regulator and main enzyme of the pentose phosphate  pathway, which is considered one of the ancient ways of glucose breakdown in the tissues of the root system under  salt stress conditions and catalyzes the oxidative stage of this pathway, and the cytoplasmic forms of the DMDH  enzyme, which is the main enzyme of malate metabolism It consisted of studying the changes in the dynamics of  activity and the indicator of the ratio of their activity.
steps_raw: Cytoplasmic forms of the enzyme Q6PDH, which is the regulator and main enzyme of the pentose phosphate  pathway, which is considered one of the ancient ways of glucose breakdown in the tissues of the root system under  salt stress conditions and catalyzes the oxidative stage of this pathway, and the cytoplasmic forms of the DMDH  enzyme, which is the main enzyme of malate metabolism It consisted of studying the changes in the dynamics of  activity and the indicator of the ratio of their activity.
keywords: enzyme Q6PDH, pentose phosphate pathway, DMDH enzymes, root system, salt solutions
